zh.lifeSummary: Anna Agnes Whitbread是Thomas Whitebread的女兒，於大約1426年出生在英國艾可武普明斯特。她於1448年與Sir Henry Wright在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1465年在她的家鄉享年40歲，埋葬在英國艾可武普明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Whitbread
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: metonymic occupational name from Middle English whit bred ‘white bread’ or whete bred ‘wheat bread’, denoting someone who baked or sold bread of the best quality, made from wheat.
nickname for someone with a white beard, Middle English whīt berd.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Anna Agnes Whitbread was born about 1426, in Upminster, Essex, England as the daughter of Thomas Whitebread. She married Sir Henry Wright in 1448, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1465, in her hometown, at the age of 40, and was buried in Upminster, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Anna Agnes Whitbread est née environ 1426, à Upminster, Essex, Angleterre, fille de Thomas Whitebread. Elle a épousé Sir Henry Wright en 1448, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1465, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Upminster, Essex, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Agnes Whitbreadは約1426年にイギリスエセックスウプミンスターでThomas Whitebreadの娘として生まれた。1448年にイギリススフォルクでSir Henry Wrightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1465年に故郷で40歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスウプミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Agnes Whitbread(은)는 대략 1426년 영국 에세스 업민스터에서 Thomas Whitebread의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1448년 영국 수폴크에서 Sir Henry Wright(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1465년 그녀의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 업민스터에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Anna Agnes Whitbread родилась около 1426 г. в местности упминстир, эссекс, Англия. Её отца звали Thomas Whitebread. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Wright в 1448 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1465 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности упминстир, эссекс, Англия.
